name: Szechwan Noodles
recipeIngredient: Pasta - hot cooked fresh homemade noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Add the pasta and toss until well coated with the sauce.
3. Garnish with shaved scallions and serve immediately.
4. Use only enough sauce to coat the pasta. Store any remaining sauce in the refrigerator.
